title: teams — field classification
description: Teams are commercial reference data. TeamMembers carry a polymorphic reference (member_type + member_id) and a set of operational fields (jersey, position, role). TeamTrials capture PII on prospective members, including anonymous ones (redacted 90 days post-decision). EventTeams record participation + result blobs. The most sensitive fields are (1) trialist anonymous profile (name/phone/email/dob), redacted per GDPR; (2) team member medical notes / injury metadata (staff-visible only, never wire-projected to the member); (3) trial decision_notes (anti-discrimination retention).

confidential: TeamMember.notes (coach-visible operational notes — never surfaced to the member themselves)
TeamMember.metadata (sport-specific stats + injury/medical annotations — staff-visible only)
TeamTrial.evaluation_notes (coach's written assessment during the trial)
TeamTrial.decision_notes (coach's rationale for accept/reject — anti-discrimination defence record)
EventTeam.result (sport-specific score + position + points — competitively sensitive)
regulated_minor: TeamTrial.trialist_first_name / last_name / phone / email when trialist_dob < 18 years ago (minor PII)
Team.coach_id (identifies the adult working with minors) — flagged when min_age or max_age < 18
regulated_health: TeamMember.metadata when it carries injury / medical annotations (opt-in field; tenants using it must ship a data-protection notice)
TeamMember.status='injured' (medical fact when combined with member identity)
audit_log: Team.coach_id (every change — critical-severity when team includes minors)
TeamTrial.status (every transition — anti-discrimination retention on rejected 3 years)

notes: The redactor pipeline strips TeamTrial.trialist_first_name + last_name + phone + email + dob on egress for callers who lack teams.trials.view-anonymous permission (a follow-up permission for the compliance surface).

TeamMember.notes is a STAFF-VISIBLE operational field — members do not see it in the wire projection. Used for coach annotations like 'shy but improving', 'needs equipment assistance', or 'flagged for review'.

TeamTrial.decision_notes is a CONFIDENTIAL field — surfaced only to the coach + branch_manager + admin. The trialist NEVER sees the reason directly; the outcome (accepted / rejected) is communicated via TrialDecisionNotification with a fixed template.

regulated_minor tagging on TeamMember.member_id + TeamTrial.trialist_* is APPLICATIVE — it applies only when the associated Athlete/User's DOB is < 18 years ago. Adult teams (min_age >= 18) don't carry the tag.
Team.primary_color + secondary_color are decorative fields. Do NOT use them for identity — screen readers get name + branch + coach, not jersey colours.

EventTeam.result is competitively sensitive across tenants — a rival tenant seeing your team's tournament scores could infer strategy. The platform.event-teams cross-tenant read is restricted to super_admin + ops.
